name: exPDite-2 is recruiting a sham-controlled phase 3 bemdaneprocel trial
summary: The ClinicalTrials.gov registry continues to show a recruiting phase 3, triple-masked, sham-surgery-controlled bemdaneprocel trial in Parkinson disease, with no posted results.
statement: As of the June 5, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov posted update, exPDite-2 is recruiting an estimated 102 participants for a randomized, triple-masked, sham-surgery-controlled phase 3 trial of bemdaneprocel in Parkinson disease, with no posted results.
time_horizon: Primary completion estimated for March 2027; full completion estimated for March 2032
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 102 estimated participants, with bemdaneprocel compared with sham surgery.
caveats: The registry entry has no efficacy results posted.
Recruitment status can change and should be rechecked during surveillance.
A Parkinson disease phase 3 program is a momentum signal, not proof of healthy-aging benefit.
